Key_Safety_Message: NEVER mix bleach with ammonia-containing products
NEVER mix bleach with hydrogen peroxide
NEVER mix bleach with toilet bowl cleaners or muriatic acid
NEVER mix bleach with rubbing alcohol
NEVER mix bleach with hand sanitizer or ethanol products
Do not mix bleach with acid toilet bowl cleaners
NEVER mix hydrogen peroxide with acetone or nail polish remover

Safe_Separation_Storage: Can be stored near each other
Key_Safety_Message: Avoid mixing H2O2 with vinegar for cleaning
NEVER mix different pool chlorine types
NEVER mix pool shock with muriatic acid

Safe_Separation_Storage: Mix in proper sequence; add NaOH to water
Key_Safety_Message: Add caustic to water NEVER water to caustic
Do not use lye drain cleaners on aluminum pipes

Safe_Separation_Storage: Add acid to water NEVER water to acid
Key_Safety_Message: CRITICAL: Never add water to concentrated sulfuric acid
NEVER mix acid and base drain cleaners
NEVER mix bleach with paint thinners or solvents
Do not mix bleach with oven/drain cleaners
Avoid mixing bleach with paint removers
